meta_description: myRapid provides a single place where you can manage quotes, orders, and account history for the parts you've order from the Rapid team at Protolabs.

sections.heading: Accelerate Manufacturing with a myRapid Account
sections.text: Accelerate Manufacturing with a myRapid Account myRapid provides a single place where you can manage quotes, orders, and account history for the parts you've order from the Rapid team at Protolabs. Log into myRapid

sections.heading: Easy Quoting for Sheet Metal and Machining
sections.text: Easy Quoting for Sheet Metal and Machining Before you upload your CAD file, you can specify the material along with the finish, color, and quantity. When your upload is complete, you'll receive an instant quote. If there are any issues with your design, your quote will get additional attention from one of our engineers. Once everything looks good, you can approve the quote and select from a variety of shipping and payment options, including purchase orders (POs).

sections.heading: myRapid Simplifies Teamwork
sections.text: myRapid Simplifies Teamwork These days, no one works in a vacuum. Each part you create has multiple stakeholders who need visibility into quote details. myRapid makes it easy. You can share your quote with others on your team all in one place, saving you time. Later, if you want to order a part again, myRapid simplifies that, too. If your company moves, we have you covered. Update all of your contact information quickly and easily right in the system. We want to make the quoting process as painless as possible!

sections.heading: Resources
sections.text: Resources Integrating Hardware into Sheet Metal Consider hardware material, placement, and other specifications to help optimize sheet metal parts. Read Design Tip arrow_right_alt Designing for Sheet Metal Fabrication An exploration of materials, manufacturing processes, design considerations, and finishing options for sheet metal prototypes and low-volume production parts. Read Guide arrow_right_alt Custom Sheet Metal Parts: Adding a Finishing Touch Whether you want to extend the life of your part, make it aesthetically pleasing, or ensure structural integrity of your assembly, it’s all about the finishing.
